name: mcp-paradigm
description: MCP server for the Paradigm trading platform — DRFQv2 RFQs, OBv1 order books, FSPD future spreads, plus identity, positions, and leaderboards.
long_description: Wraps the Paradigm REST surfaces and exposes typed MCP tools across three active products: DRFQv2 (bilateral request-for-quote), OBv1 (Unified Markets order books — long-lived multi-counterparty auctions with maker quotes and taker fills), and FSPD (Future Spread Direct — orderbook for future spreads with limit/market orders, post-only/IOC, replace, cancel-all). Also covers firm-level identity credentials, positions, and the cross-firm trade-volume and liquidity leaderboards. Authenticated requests are HMAC-signed via a pluggable Signer (env-key for local; Vault Transit / AWS KMS planned). Order placement, quoting, market creation, and MMP reset are annotated destructive so MCP clients can prompt for approval.

tools.name: paradigm_echo
tools.description: Round-trip a payload through Paradigm's echo endpoint — first call to confirm access key, signing key, and base URL are correct.

tools.name: paradigm_instruments
tools.description: List tradable instruments. Filter by venue, base currency, kind, margin kind, state, or venue-native name.

tools.name: paradigm_instrument
tools.description: Fetch a single instrument by Paradigm id (including expired).

tools.name: paradigm_counterparties
tools.description: List desks the firm can RFQ — desk_name, firm_name, groups, venues.

tools.name: paradigm_platform_state
tools.description: Current and next DRFQv2 platform state (maintenance windows).

tools.name: paradigm_rfqs
tools.description: List RFQs visible to the desk. Filters: state, role, venue, strategies, product_codes.

tools.name: paradigm_rfq
tools.description: Fetch a single RFQ by id.

tools.name: paradigm_rfq_bbo
tools.description: Best bid/offer for an RFQ — mark, min/max price, greeks, per-leg bbo.

tools.name: paradigm_rfq_orders
tools.description: Order book against an RFQ: asks[] and bids[] with price, quantity, and desk.

tools.name: paradigm_create_rfq
tools.description: Create a new RFQ. Sends a request-for-quote on the wire to the chosen counterparties.

tools.name: paradigm_cancel_rfq
tools.description: Cancel an open RFQ before expiry.

tools.name: paradigm_orders
tools.description: List the desk's orders. Filters: rfq_id, state, venue, currency, base_currency.

tools.name: paradigm_order
tools.description: Fetch a single order by id.

tools.name: paradigm_post_order
tools.description: Post an order against an RFQ (maker GTC quote or taker FOK cross). Response state is PENDING; poll or subscribe for terminal state. Destructive — puts money on the wire.

tools.name: paradigm_update_order
tools.description: Amend an existing order (price / quantity). Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a single order.

tools.name: paradigm_cancel_orders_batch
tools.description: Batch-cancel orders by filter. Returns successes and failures (may be 207 partial).

tools.name: paradigm_trades
tools.description: Cleared block trades for the desk. Filters: state, venue, product_codes.

tools.name: paradigm_trade
tools.description: Fetch a single trade.

tools.name: paradigm_trade_tape
tools.description: Public anonymized trade tape across the network.

tools.name: paradigm_price_legs
tools.description: Given strategy bid/ask, return per-leg prices.

tools.name: paradigm_mmp_status
tools.description: DRFQv2 Market Maker Protection status — rate_limit_hit boolean.

tools.name: paradigm_mmp_reset
tools.description: Reset the DRFQv2 MMP flag to re-arm the desk for quoting. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_instruments
tools.description: List FSPD instruments. Filters: venue, kind, margin_type, state, clearing/settlement currency.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_strategies
tools.description: List tradeable FSPD strategies (future spreads, spot/future structures).

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_strategy
tools.description: Fetch a single FSPD strategy by id, including its legs.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_orderbook
tools.description: Full FSPD orderbook (bids + asks with order_ids) for a strategy.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_orderbook_summary
tools.description: BBO summary for an FSPD strategy: best bid/ask + last trade.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_orders
tools.description: List FSPD orders for the desk. Filters: strategy_id, state, venue, kind, type.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_order
tools.description: Fetch a single FSPD order with its event history.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_post_order
tools.description: Post an FSPD order (LIMIT/MARKET, GTC/IOC, optional post_only). Destructive — puts money on the wire.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_replace_order
tools.description: Replace an existing FSPD order in one call. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a single FSPD order.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_cancel_all_orders
tools.description: Cancel all FSPD orders for the desk, optionally filtered by label.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_trades
tools.description: List FSPD trades for the desk. Filters: strategy, order, venue, role, settlement currency.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_trade
tools.description: Fetch a single FSPD trade with its legs.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_venues
tools.description: Status of all FSPD clearing venues.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_venue
tools.description: Status of a single FSPD venue.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_system_state
tools.description: Operational state of the FSPD system.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_system_time
tools.description: FSPD server time (unix nanoseconds).

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_mmp_status
tools.description: Current FSPD Market Maker Protection status.

tools.name: paradigm_fspd_mmp_reset
tools.description: Reset the FSPD MMP flag. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_instruments
tools.description: List OBv1 instruments. Filters: venue, asset (BCH/BTC/ETH), kind (FUTURE/OPTION), name.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_instrument
tools.description: Fetch a single OBv1 instrument by (venue, venue-native name).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_platform_state
tools.description: Current and next OBv1 platform state.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_obs
tools.description: List active OBv1 order book markets (long-lived multi-counterparty auctions).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_ob
tools.description: Fetch a single OBv1 market by id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_bbo
tools.description: BBO for an OBv1 market — mark, index, per-leg bbo + greeks.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_ob_quotes
tools.description: All active quotes on an OBv1 market (asks/bids).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_create_ob
tools.description: Open a new OBv1 order book market. Multi-counterparty, public. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_quotes
tools.description: List the desk's OBv1 quotes.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_quote
tools.description: Fetch a single OBv1 quote by id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_post_quote
tools.description: Post a maker quote on an OBv1 market (post_only / IOC supported). Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_update_quote
tools.description: Replace an existing OBv1 quote in one call. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_cancel_quote
tools.description: Cancel a single OBv1 quote.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_cancel_quotes_batch
tools.description: Batch-cancel OBv1 quotes by filter. Returns an action_id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_orders
tools.description: List OBv1 fill orders (taker-side fills against maker quotes).

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_order
tools.description: Fetch a single OBv1 fill order by id.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_trades
tools.description: List OBv1 block trades visible to the desk.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_trade
tools.description: Fetch detailed BlockTrade if the desk is part of it.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_blotter
tools.description: The desk's OBv1 block trades ordered by traded_at descending.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_trade_tape
tools.description: Public anonymized OBv1 trade tape.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_price_legs
tools.description: Per-leg pricing for an OBv1 strategy bid/ask.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_mmp_status
tools.description: Current OBv1 Market Maker Protection status.

tools.name: paradigm_obv1_mmp_reset
tools.description: Reset the OBv1 MMP flag. Destructive.

tools.name: paradigm_identity_credentials
tools.description: Active venue API credentials registered for the desk.

tools.name: paradigm_positions
tools.description: All positions for the trading desk across venues.

tools.name: paradigm_positions_refresh
tools.description: Trigger an async refresh of the desk positions cache.

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard_trade_volume
tools.description: Cross-firm trade volume leaderboard.

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard_liquidity_fills
tools.description: Liquidity fills leaderboard — quote rate, fill rate, spread rank.

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard_liquidity_responses
tools.description: Liquidity response leaderboard — response-time buckets and quote rate.

tools.name: paradigm_leaderboard_set_preferences
tools.description: Set the firm's leaderboard anonymity preference.

paradigm_access_key.title: Paradigm Access Key
paradigm_access_key.description: Bearer access key issued by Paradigm. Required for all authenticated tools.

paradigm_signing_key.title: Paradigm Signing Key
paradigm_signing_key.description: Base64-encoded HMAC signing key issued by Paradigm. Used to sign every outbound request.

paradigm_account.title: Account (multi-desk)
paradigm_account.description: Optional account name for multi-desk firms — sent as the Paradigm-Account header.

paradigm_fspd_base_url.title: FSPD Base URL Override
paradigm_fspd_base_url.description: Optional override for the FSPD API base URL. Defaults to api.fspd.paradigm.co (prod) or api.fspd.test.paradigm.co (testnet).
